_comment: Generic per-class leveling gems, used when a PoB has no act-tagged skill sets (buildgen/pob.py make_plan fallback). Verified 2026-07-08 against Maxroll's class leveling guides (all 'Reviewed for PoE 3.28 Mirage') and poewiki gem levels. Edit freely — one short line per act, it renders on the overlay card's gem row. '@N' = character level. Re-check after 3.29 patch notes (Jul 16).

Witch.1: Rolling Magma + Elemental Proliferation; @4 Flame Wall, Holy Flame Totem, Frostblink
Witch.2: @16 Herald of Thunder + Skitterbots + Wave of Conviction; Shield Charge for travel
Witch.3: @24 Flammability on bosses; @28 swap Armageddon Brand + free Cremation quest gem
Witch.4: @38 brand 4L: +Combustion + Immolate + Ignite Prolif; Cremation + Conc Effect
Witch.5: coast on brand + corpses; wand/sceptre upgrade (+1 fire, spell dmg); Kitava -30% res next
Witch.6: resists back to 75%; Cremation links: +Elemental Focus or Cruelty @18
Witch.7: lab #2 on route; aura swap @24: Haste travelling, Anger on bosses
Witch.8: life + res on every slot; Conc Effect on Cremation melts tough rares
Witch.9: flasks up to date (bubbling life, ample mana); gems ~17-18
Witch.10: final res check — Kitava -30% again after; portal up before the fight

Templar.1: Holy Strike + Hallow (new 3.28 gems) or Rolling Magma; @4 Holy Flame Totem + Flame Wall
Templar.2: @10 Leap Slam + Momentum; @16 Herald of Thunder
Templar.3: @24 Anger on bosses; @28 swap Armageddon Brand + free Cremation for single target
Templar.4: @38 brand 4L: +Combustion + Immolate + Ignite Prolif; Cremation + Conc Effect
Templar.5: coast; sceptre with flat fire to spells (bench craft @24) beats gem tweaks
Templar.7: lab #2 on route; keep brand + totem levels capped
Templar.8: life + res everywhere; Conc Effect swap for tanky rares
Templar.10: res check before Kitava (-30% after); bench-craft missing res

Marauder.1: Ground Slam + Ruthless (lvl 1!) + Chance to Bleed; @4 War Banner + Blood and Sand
Marauder.2: @10 Leap Slam + Faster Attacks + Momentum; @12 swap Sunder; @16 Herald of Ash + Blood Rage
Marauder.3: @18 Sunder - Melee Physical Damage - Close Combat; @24 Pride on bosses, Haste travelling
Marauder.4: @38 4th link: Fist of War or Brutality; weapon > gems — chase pDPS every act
Marauder.5: coast; a better 2H every act or two carries the whole campaign
Marauder.6: resists to 75% after Kitava's -30%; life on every slot
Marauder.7: lab #2 on route; Intimidating Cry @10 before big slams if you like warcries
Marauder.8: weapon pass again (~200+ pDPS); Vulnerability curse on bosses
Marauder.9: flasks: bleed immunity is mandatory; gems ~17-18
Marauder.10: res check before Kitava; portal in town before the fight

Duelist.1: Spectral Throw + Chance to Bleed (carries until Sunder); @8 Frostblink
Duelist.2: @10 Leap Slam + Faster Attacks + Momentum; @12 swap Sunder + Ruthless; @16 Herald of Ash
Duelist.3: @18 Sunder - Melee Physical Damage - Close Combat; @24 Pride bosses / Haste travel
Duelist.4: @38 4th link: Fist of War; 1H+shield = comfy, 2H = faster — either way chase pDPS
Duelist.5: coast; weapon upgrade every act or two beats any gem tweak
Duelist.6: resists back to 75% post-Kitava; life everywhere
Duelist.7: lab #2 on route; Blood Rage @16 if you can sustain it
Duelist.10: res check before Kitava (-30% again after)

Ranger.1: Galvanic Arrow + Momentum; @4 +Mirage Archer, Dash; Frostblink when found
Ranger.2: @12 swap Lightning Arrow + Mirage Archer + LMP; @16 Herald of Ice
Ranger.3: @24 Anger on bosses; @28 Manaforged Arrows + Storm Rain = free extra single target
Ranger.4: @38 +Returning Projectiles; bow upgrade every act — flat ele beats links
Ranger.5: coast; highest flat-ele bow wins, bench-craft flat cold/lightning
Ranger.6: resists to 75% post-Kitava; Grace aura from A8 if squishy
Ranger.7: lab #2 on route; quiver + rings with flat ele
Ranger.8: Barrage Support swap on bosses; life + res gear pass
Ranger.10: res check before Kitava; keep distance, portal ready

Shadow.1: Cobra Lash to open, swap Rolling Magma + Ele Prolif ASAP (caster Shadow is the meta)
Shadow.2: @4 Frostblink + Flame Wall; @16 Herald of Thunder + Skitterbots + Wave of Conviction
Shadow.3: @24 Flammability; @28 Armageddon Brand + free Cremation; Whirling Blades @10 to move
Shadow.4: @38 brand 4L: +Combustion + Immolate + Ignite Prolif; Cremation + Conc Effect
Shadow.5: coast on brand + corpses; dagger/sceptre with spell damage
Shadow.6: resists back to 75% post-Kitava; life + evasion gear
Shadow.7: lab #2 on route; aura swap: Haste travel / Anger bosses
Shadow.8: Conc Effect on Cremation for bosses; keep gems capped

Scion.1: Spectral Throw + Prismatic Burst + Momentum; @4 War Banner
Scion.2: @10 Leap Slam + Faster Attacks; @12 swap Sunder; @16 Herald of Ash
Scion.3: @18 Sunder - Melee Physical Damage - Close Combat; @24 Pride bosses / Haste travel
Scion.4: @38 4th link: Ruthless or Fist of War; weapon upgrades carry you
Scion.5: coast; Reliquarian asc (3.28) is unique-focused — plan lab picks in PoB
Scion.6: resists back to 75% post-Kitava; life on every slot
Scion.7: lab #2 on route; Ascendant points are flexible — damage node first
Scion.8: boss swap support; keep gems capped
Scion.10: res check before Kitava (-30% again after)
